## Phase 1 PR Checklist

- [ ] Tests added for all new behaviour
- [ ] `dart analyze --fatal-infos` passes with zero issues
- [ ] `dart format` applied (`dart format --set-exit-if-changed .`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` (or this is the release PR)
- [ ] All exported public symbols have Dartdoc comments
- [ ] Generated files (FlEnvKey.kt/.swift, registry.bin) are gitignored and NOT committed
- [ ] Security: no plaintext secrets appear in diffs
